title: Data Scaling Path
description: Build fluency in Data Scaling inside Reinforcement Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Q-Value
steps.summary: Q-Value belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Data Scaling. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Data Scaling. Compare it with Value Iteration and Fitted Value Iteration. It opens into Value Iteration and Expected Value SARSA.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Value Iteration
steps.summary: Value Iteration belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Data Scaling. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Data Scaling. Start after Q-Value and Value Function. It opens into Fitted Value Iteration.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Expected Value SARSA
steps.summary: Expected Value SARSA belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Data Scaling. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Data Scaling. Start after Q-Value and Expected SARSA.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Fitted Value Iteration
steps.summary: Fitted Value Iteration belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Data Scaling. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Data Scaling. Start after Value Iteration and Q-Value.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Positive Predictive Value (PPV)
steps.summary: Positive Predictive Value (PPV) belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Data Scaling. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Data Scaling. Start after Q-Value and Value Function.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Negative Predictive Value (NPV)
steps.summary: Negative Predictive Value (NPV) belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Data Scaling. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Data Scaling. Start after Q-Value and Value Function.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Upper Confidence Bound (UCB)
steps.summary: Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Data Scaling. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Data Scaling. Compare it with Positive Predictive Value (PPV) and Negative Predictive Value (NPV).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
